THE JET STANDARD
Back to Home

Terms of Service

Last Updated: April 29, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using thejetstandard.com (the "Site"), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use this Site.

2. Nature of Our Service

2.1 Affiliate Partner

The Jet Standard is an independent affiliate partner of Villiers Jets. We are not an air carrier, and we do not operate aircraft or provide air transportation services directly.

2.2 Referral Service

We provide a referral service that connects you with Villiers Jets, a third-party air charter operator. All flight bookings are made directly through Villiers Jets, subject to their terms and conditions.

2.3 No Direct Contract

When you book a flight through our Site, your contract for air transportation is with Villiers Jets and/or the operating air carrier, not with The Jet Standard.

3. Use of Website

3.1 Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts to use this Site.

3.2 Prohibited Uses

You agree not to:

  • Use the Site for any illegal purpose
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
  • Interfere with the proper functioning of the Site
  • Use automated systems to access the Site without permission
  • Copy, modify, or distribute content from the Site without authorization

4. Quote Requests and Bookings

4.1 Quote Accuracy

Quotes provided through our Site are estimates based on information you provide. Final pricing is determined by Villiers Jets and may vary based on:

  • Aircraft availability
  • Fuel costs
  • Landing fees
  • Crew expenses
  • Last-minute changes to itinerary
  • Seasonal demand

4.2 Booking Confirmation

A booking is only confirmed when you receive written confirmation from Villiers Jets. We do not guarantee aircraft availability or pricing until confirmation is received.

4.3 Cancellations and Changes

Cancellation and change policies are set by Villiers Jets and the operating carrier. Review their terms carefully before booking. We are not responsible for cancellation fees or policy changes.

5. Pricing and Payment

5.1 Price Variability

All prices are subject to change without notice. Empty leg deals and promotional pricing are subject to availability and may be withdrawn at any time.

5.2 Payment Processing

All payments are processed by Villiers Jets or their designated payment processor. We do not handle or store your payment information.

5.3 Additional Fees

Additional fees may apply, including but not limited to:

  • Federal excise taxes
  • Segment fees
  • International fees
  • De-icing fees
  • Pet fees
  • Catering requests
  • Ground transportation

6. Affiliate Disclosure

The Jet Standard participates in the Villiers Jets affiliate program. We earn commissions on bookings made through our Site. This does not affect your pricing—all commissions are paid by Villiers Jets, not by you.

7. Intellectual Property

7.1 Our Content

All content on this Site, including text, images, logos, and graphics, is owned by The Jet Standard or our licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark laws.

7.2 Limited License

You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Site for personal, non-commercial purposes only.

8. Disclaimers

8.1 No Warranty

The Site is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to:

  • Merchantability
  • Fitness for a particular purpose
  • Non-infringement
  • Accuracy or completeness of information

8.2 Flight Operations

We make no representations or warranties regarding flight operations, safety, aircraft condition, or crew qualifications. These are the responsibility of Villiers Jets and the operating carrier.

8.3 Third-Party Links

Our Site may contain links to third-party websites. We do not endorse and are not responsible for the content or practices of these sites.

9. Limitation of Liability

9.1 No Consequential Damages

To the maximum extent permitted by law, The Jet Standard shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to:

  • Loss of profits or revenue
  • Business interruption
  • Travel delays or cancellations
  • Missed connections or events

9.2 Maximum Liability

Our total liability to you for any claim arising from these Terms or your use of the Site shall not exceed the amount of commissions we earned from your booking, if any.

9.3 Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless The Jet Standard from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the Site or violation of these Terms.

10. Privacy

Your use of the Site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, available at privacy.html. By using the Site, you consent to our collection and use of information as described in the Privacy Policy.

11. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of San Diego County, California.

12. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the Site. Your continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

13. Termination

We may terminate or suspend your access to the Site at any time, with or without cause, with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Site will immediately cease.

14. Contact Information

For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

Email: legal@thejetstandard.com
Email: thejetstandard@gmail.com
Address: The Jet Standard, [Business Address], San Diego, CA 92101
